front: What are the ADMET properties and how are they assessed?
back: ADMET = Absorption, Distribution, Metabolism, Excretion, Toxicity. Assessed in silico (QSAR), in vitro (Caco-2, microsomes, hERG), and in vivo (PK studies). Lipinski rule of 5 predicts oral bioavailability. hERG channel inhibition predicts cardiac toxicity.
